mutation_result.mutation_source:
def self.parse(dice_notation)
  match_data = dice_notation.match(/^(\d*)d(\d+)([+-]\d+)?$/i)
  unless match_data
    raise(ArgumentError, "Invalid dice notation: #{dice_notation}")
  end
  num_dice = if match_data[1].empty?
    1
  else
    match_data[1].to_i
  end
  sides = match_data[2].to_i
  modifier = if match_data[3].nil?
    0
  else
    match_data[3].to_i
  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

def self.parse(dice_notation)
  match_data = dice_notation.match(/^(\D*)d(\d+)([+-]\d+)?$/i)
  unless match_data
    raise(ArgumentError, "Invalid dice notation: #{dice_notation}")
  end
  num_dice = if match_data[1].empty?
    1

def self.parse(dice_notation)

  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

def self.parse(dice_notation)

  unless match_data

    0

    match_data[3].to_i
  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

  match_data = dice_notation.match(/^(\d*)d(\d+)([+-]\d+)?$/i)
  unless match_data
    raise(ArgumentError, "Invalid dice notation: #{dice_notation}")
  end
  num_dice = if match_data[1].empty?
    1
  else
    match_data[1].to_i
  end
  sides = match_data[2].to_i
  modifier = if match_data[3]
    0
  else
    match_data[3].to_i
  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

def self.parse(dice_notation)
  match_data = dice_notation.match(/^(\d*)d(\d+)([+-]\d+)?$/i)
  unless match_data
    raise(ArgumentError, "Invalid dice notation: #{dice_notation}")
  end
  num_dice = if match_data[1].empty?
    1
  else
    match_data[1].to_i
  end
  sides = match_data[2].to_i
  modifier = if match_data[1].nil?
    0
  else
    match_data[3].to_i
  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

  match_data = dice_notation.match(/^(\d*)d(\d+)([+-]\d+)?$/i)
  unless match_data

  end
  num_dice = if match_data[1].empty?

    match_data[1].to_i
  end
  sides = match_data[2].to_i
  modifier = if match_data[3].nil?

    match_data[3].to_i
  end
  new(num_dice, sides, modifier:)
end

def initialize(count, sides, rolls: nil, modifier: 0)
  unless count.positive?
    raise(InvalidDiceCountError, "Dice count must be greater than 0")
  end
  unless sides.positive?
    raise(InvalidDiceSidesError, "Dice sides must be greater than 0")
  end
  if rolls
    validate_rolls(rolls, sides)
  end
  @sides = sides
  @rolls = rolls || []
  @modifier = modifier
end

def initialize(count, sides, rolls: nil, modifier: 0)
  unless count.positive?
    raise(InvalidDiceCountError, "Dice count must be greater than 0")
  end
  unless sides.positive?
    raise(InvalidDiceSidesError, "Dice sides must be greater than 0")
  end
  if rolls
    validate_rolls(rolls, sides)
  end
  @count = count
  @sides = sides
  @modifier = modifier
end

def validate_rolls(rolls, sides)
  unless rolls.is_a?(Array)
    raise(InvalidRollsError, "Rolls must be an array")
  end
  unless rolls.any? { |roll|
    roll < 1 || roll > sides
  }
    return
  end
  raise(InvalidRollsError, "Rolls must be between 1 and #{sides}")
end
